data.title: New owner acquires 3rd PostalAnnex store in San Jose, California, providing shipping and office services. Franchisor Annex Brands, Inc. supports local entrepreneurs. (Total characters: 145)
data.description: San Diego-based Annex Brands, Inc. is backing local entrepreneurs to maintain vital shipping and office services. As of October 16, 2025, the esteemed franchisor in packing, shipping, and office services discloses its support in the effective handover of operations.

data.title: VIAVI completes acquisition of Spirent Communications plc's high-speed Ethernet, network security, and channel emulation testing business, expanding its product portfolio.
data.description: VIAVI has expanded its offerings in high-speed ethernet, network security, and channel emulation testing through a recent acquisition. This move allows VIAVI to provide a more comprehensive product portfolio in areas such as ethernet, application performance, security, AI, and digital infrastructure. The acquisition was completed on October 16, 2025, in Chandler, Arizona. This strategic decision is expected to enhance VIAVI's capabilities and further solidify its position in the market.

data.title: NYSE delivers pre-market update with market insights; HPE unveils business priorities; Ashley Mastronardi reports on Oct. 16, 2025.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update, offering valuable insights directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can gain an early understanding of the market before trading commences. Ashley Mastronardi delivered the pre-market update, providing essential information for the trading day. Stay informed and make well-informed decisions by accessing the NYSE Pre-market update.

data.title: Dickinson Brands Inc. marks 5th National Witch Hazel Day on Oct 21. Genuine Witch Hazel gains TikTok popularity, set to shine in 2025.
data.description: In 2025, Genuine Distilled Witch Hazel is gaining widespread attention for its versatility, with a surge in popularity on TikTok. Dickinson Brands Inc., a company with a prestigious 150-year history in witch hazel, is proud to announce this development. The product has been honored with a National Day celebration.

data.title: Atomic-6 introduces Space Armor™ Tiles to protect assets in space from debris. Revolutionary product unveiled in October 2025.
data.description: A new shielding technology has been developed by Atomic-6, based in Marietta, Georgia. This advanced mobility composites manufacturer unveiled Space Armor™ on October 16, 2025. The product offers next-generation protection for spacecraft and astronauts, providing improved defense for their assets. This innovation aims to enhance safety and security in space operations.

data.title: AFDG becomes first US public company in DRC; Economic and Investment Forum hosted in Washington, D.C. (October 16, 2025).
data.description: The Economic and Investment Forum hosted by the United States and the Democratic Republic of the Congo in Washington, D.C took place on October 16, 2025. This event aimed to strengthen economic ties between the two nations. Over a two-day period, government officials and business leaders from both countries convened to discuss investment opportunities and collaboration. Significant topics included infrastructure development, trade partnerships, and investment projects. The forum saw the participation of over 200 delegates, with discussions centered on increasing bilateral trade and fostering economic growth. Through this initiative, both the US and the DRC seek to enhance cooperation and stimulate investment, highlighting the potential for future economic development between the two nations.

data.title: Kaizen Circularity AI launches SaaS Platform to cut raw material costs, enhance metal production, and promote sustainability.
data.description: Atlanta-based Kaizen Circularity AI, Inc., revealed on October 16, 2025, the release of its new Circularity AI Platform. This technology company aims to boost the circular economy within metals manufacturing. The platform, a Software as a Service (SaaS) application, operates through the cloud and is designed to assist metal producers in enhancing their sustainability efforts.

data.title: ESP Lab, founded in 1965, appoints Howard Sherman as president to mark its 60th anniversary and usher in an Age of Enlightenment.
data.description: Established in 1965 by the renowned Occult Master Al Manning, ESP Lab is now entering a promising new chapter. Recently, on October 16, 2025, the organization revealed Howard Sherman as its new president. With a vision to bring forth a new Age of Enlightenment, Sherman aims to captivate both present and upcoming audiences with spiritual teachings.

data.title: Investment firm BlackRock plans to enter growing stablecoin market with revamped fund following GENIUS Act for secure issuer reserves.
data.description: BlackRock is venturing into the stablecoin industry by launching a revamped money market fund that aligns with the recently enacted GENIUS Act. This move aims to offer a dependable reserve option for issuers looking for stability in the market.

data.title: Kenya's data center market: Existing capacity 20MW, upcoming 200MW. Nairobi leads with 45% power capacity. 25MW expected by 2025. - ResearchAndMarkets.com
data.description: A recent database "Kenya Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has been incorporated into ResearchAndMarkets.com. Nairobi holds the lead in Kenya's upcoming data center market, with over 45% of the total power capacity. Currently, the existing data center capacity in Kenya stands at close to 20 MW, while the forthcoming capacity is projected to reach approximately 200 MW. By the conclusion of 2025, an estimated 25 MW of extra power capacity is anticipated to be introduced. The data signifies the significant growth and potential in the data center sector in Kenya.
